review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control SC-7(16) by focusing on boundary protection through network policies and service configurations. Naming conventions are mostly followed, but minor improvements could enhance clarity.
naming_improvements: Consider renaming 'k8s_service_type_not_nodeport' to 'k8s_service_nodeport_disabled' for clearer indication of the check's purpose.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | prevent discovery of system components prevent the discove
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7(16) focuses on boundary protection to prevent the discovery of system components. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security practices that restrict unauthorized access and exposure of services. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions to prevent unauthorized discovery and access. Additionally, using service types that do not expose services directly to the internet (e.g., avoiding NodePort) and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress controllers further enhances boundary protection.
